vibe: Grounded, trust, matte, physical, calm, objective, professional.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Control Room Grid for dashboard density mixed with Organic generous padding. Use wide spacing inside forms to avoid cramped financial data.

components.button: bg-[#284236] text-white rounded-md px-5 py-2.5 font-medium hover:bg-[#1E3329] transition-all focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#C89F65] outline-none
components.button_outline: border border-[#D6D3CA] text-[#284236] rounded-md px-5 py-2.5 font-medium hover:bg-[#F0EFEA] transition-all
components.input: w-full border border-[#D6D3CA] bg-white rounded-md p-3 text-[#182620] focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#284236]/20 focus:border-[#284236] font-mono transition-colors
components.card: bg-white rounded-lg border border-[#D6D3CA] shadow-sm p-6
components.table_header: bg-[#F0EFEA] text-[#57665E] font-medium text-xs tracking-wider uppercase p-3 border-y border-[#D6D3CA]
components.badge_success: bg-[#3A6E55]/10 text-[#3A6E55] px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold
components.badge_error: bg-[#B84A3B]/10 text-[#B84A3B] px-2 py-1 rounded text-xs font-bold
components.print_view: bg-white w-full max-w-[210mm] min-h-[297mm] mx-auto p-12 print:p-0 print:m-0 print:border-none border border-[#D6D3CA]

image_urls.placement: Top left header for branding the application.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build a bilingual (Turkish + English) interface. Use labels like 'Firma Adı / Company Name' or 'Tahsilat Makbuzu / Payment Voucher'.
Use pure HTML+Tailwind for layout structure (Control Room Grid). Use Shadcn/UI (heavily customized to match the Organic & Earthy palette) for Inputs, Dialogs, Tables.
Form inputs must include: Main Voucher Amount (USD, D17), Exchange Rate (TRY/USD, I17), Actual Invoice Amount (TL, D21 - Optional), Company Name, Customer Code, Invoice No, Date.
Use JetBrains Mono or IBM Plex Sans for all numeric inputs/outputs to guarantee clear data reading and tabular alignment.
The layout should consist of 3 primary sections: 1. Input Form (Left), 2. Live Calculated Results (Right - Sticky/Fixed relative to scroll), 3. Voucher History Table (Below).
Live Calculations MUST show: Required Invoice Amount (TL, D19), Cash Paid (USD, D23), Bank Transfer (TL, D25), Validation Total (D27), and 4 KDV fields.
Include a dynamic Success/Error validation indicator for D27. It must highlight green if D27 equals D17 exactly. If not, it shows a warning/error color.
Implement a Settings Dialog to manage 'KDV Rate %' and 'Invoice Divisor' (default 2 for 'half of voucher').
Create a robust Printable PDF/View mode. It must strip away sidebars/navigation, render in A4 proportions, and mimic the original Excel receipt layout perfectly.
All cards must have flat solid backgrounds (`bg-white`). Do not use glassmorphism or muddy transparencies for this financial data app.
Every interactive or critical informational element MUST have a `data-testid` attribute (e.g. `data-testid="input-voucher-amount"`).
